completed_tasks.description: Three-part fix to renderHBadges: explicit-H awareness + angular-gap placement
completed_tasks.detail: Fix 1: skip badge when implicitCount <= 0 (all H explicit). Fix 2: per-atom residual badge count (H/H2/H3). Fix 3: unified angular-gap algorithm — badge at midpoint of largest gap among all bond+explicit-H neighbor directions. 171 tests passing.

current_task.description: Browser verification on the anabasine-like InChI

context_notes.algorithm_detail: For each heavy atom needing a badge: collect atan2 angles to ALL bonded neighbors in SVG (heavy atoms + explicit H). Sort, find largest gap, badge at gap midpoint. Fallback to centroid-based when no neighbor SVG positions available.

human_actions_pending.action: Browser verify on anabasine InChI: (a) fully-explicit atoms show no badge, (b) mixed explicit/implicit atoms show residual count badge, (c) badge does not land on a bond line, (d) methyl CH2 (1 explicit H removed) shows 'H' badge away from bond and explicit H
human_actions_pending.context: getBBox() mocked in tests — actual visual placement requires browser verification

decisions.decision: Unified angular-gap algorithm replaces avoidDir + centroid fallback
decisions.rationale: avoidDir only avoided explicit H; centroid avoided rings. Neither avoided bond lines. Gap algorithm handles all three in one pass.
Previous binary skip (any explicit H -> no badge) missed the mixed case where an atom has both explicit and remaining implicit H.

next_action: Browser verify. If OK: commit all modified files with 'fix(08): angular-gap badge placement + explicit-H-aware implicit count', then /gsd-complete-milestone
